notes: Added pure EntryPathConverter (Kizba/Infrastructure/Store/EntryPathConverter.swift): static func entryPath(from:storeRoot:) -> String?. Strictly IO-free (no FileManager, no logging) per durable decisions. Returns nil for non-.gpg files, files outside the store root, the store root itself, and bare `.gpg` filenames. Strips only the final `.gpg` extension; preserves Unicode, whitespace, and earlier dots in basenames verbatim. 8 deterministic XCTests added; full suite green (153 passed, 8 new). Xcodeproj uses PBXFileSystemSynchronizedRootGroup so project.pbxproj was not modified.
commits: feat(store): add EntryPathConverter (pure URL -> entry path)
